title: TODO: short title
description: A process is hung waiting on a lock file at /srv/shared/lockfile. The root cause is unknown. The lock must be cleared and the root cause recorded as lock_cleared, with the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/hung-process.trace to see what it is waiting for
hint_2: waiting_on=/srv/shared/lockfile means the process is blocked on a lock held by another process that may have crashed
hint_3: Identify the lock holder with lsof, remove the stale lock file, and the hung process unblocks
